summary: Full E2E validation of SENTINEL (FastAPI + Claude Sonnet 4.5 + React). 7/7 backend pytest cases pass and 11/11 Playwright UI checks pass. Demo FIR flow works end-to-end: Load Demo FIR populates textarea -> Initiate Analysis triggers Claude Sonnet 4.5 -> EvidencePanel, Timeline (7 events, STATED blue / INFERRED amber dashed), AlternateScenarios, and CaseSummary all render with real data. Reasoning toggle expands, Export JSON downloads a valid file, Flag for Review toast appears, Footer shows RESTRICTED classification and case ref. Persistence verified via GET /api/cases and GET /api/cases/{case_id} (no _id leak).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is still lean (~270 lines) — acceptable. If more endpoints are added, consider splitting LLM prompt + parsing into a separate module.
analyze_fir_with_llm creates a fresh LlmChat per request which is correct for session isolation; _extract_json uses greedy regex fallback which is sensible.
Consider adding input length upper bound (e.g., 20k chars) on POST /api/cases/analyze to guard against pathological inputs — not blocking for MVP.
Frontend handleLoadDemo manipulates the textarea via native setter which is a slight anti-pattern in React; it works but controlled-state via a ref/state prop on UploadModule would be cleaner.
Generate Report (PDF) button invokes window.print() only — labelled 'PDF' but no true PDF export. Flag for polish, not a bug.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Each analyze run inserts a real case in MongoDB cases collection (case_id prefix CASE-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-XXXX). Not cleaned up; safe to leave as demo history.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_sentinel.py uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. LLM call takes ~10-20s; TIMEOUT_LLM=120s. Frontend data-testids in use: sentinel-wordmark, case-id, active-case-badge, officer-name, hero-heading, hero-upload-btn, upload-module, load-demo-btn, fir-textarea, initiate-analysis-btn, timeline-section, timeline-event-{i}, timeline-event-desc-{i}, timeline-reasoning-toggle-{i}, case-summary, export-json-btn, export-pdf-btn, flag-review-btn.
